title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd!
